novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: Exhibit 9.2's focal S_W collision transcript fails re-execution: E(Y_1-Y_0|W=1,G=0) recomputes to 13/5, not the displayed 23/10.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The displayed S_W(P10)=S_W(P01) value is arithmetically wrong because the W=1,G=0 conditional mean is 13/5 rather than 23/10.

soundness_flags.label: Locked parameters / Abstract vs Main results
soundness_flags.one_line: The locked block and abstract advertise Lambda(P)=(det B,kappa) with kappa=Delta_0-m, while Section 6 and Section 8 use Omega(P)=(delta_pt,delta_br).

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Correct Exhibit 9.2 by recomputing the full S_W vector from raw cells, then paste the corrected SC10 transcript with the recomputed invariant checks.
Choose one focal signature, either Lambda or Omega, and propagate that convention through the locked block, abstract, setup, main results, and exhibits.

To meet the flagship floor, replace the finite four-law witness with a generic-class theorem: characterize exactly when S_W is sufficient for BR over an open finite-law class, with an observable decision predicate or sharp frontier.

recommended_next_step: Reject this version; the focal-object exhibit fails the required arithmetic re-verification and the current finite-witness kernel is below the flagship floor.
